rubric: Grade tax responses on: (1) correct Swiss federal article cited (LIFD/DBG, LHID, LIA, LT); (2) numerically accurate rates, thresholds, or deduction amounts for 2026; (3) correct cantonal context if relevant; (4) no French CGI / DGFIP / BOFiP references; (5) no German UStG / EStG references.
